TextView.android:text:
Hydration

1.Drink Water
Drinking enough water daily at least 6 to 8 glasses will help keep the body hydrated and active.

2.Morning Water
Drinking water early in the morning helps wake up the body and start metabolism.

3.Carry Water Bottle
Always carrying a water bottle helps remind you to drink water throughout the day.

4.Drink After Exercise
Drinking water after exercise helps replace lost fluids and keeps the body balanced.

5.Fruits with Water
Eating fruits like watermelon and oranges helps add more water to the body.

6.Avoid Sugary Drinks
Avoid too many sugary drinks as they do not hydrate the body properly.

7.Drink Before Sleep
Drinking a little water before sleep helps prevent dehydration at night.

8.Listen to Your Body
Drink water whenever you feel thirsty and do not ignore the signs of dehydration.
